endpoints.name: fec_campaign_finance
endpoints.description: FEC campaign finance — candidates, committees, and contribution totals by election cycle. Req: { name?: string, committee?: string, cycle?: string }

endpoints.name: epa_environmental_violations
endpoints.description: EPA ECHO enforcement and environmental violation records — facility inspections and penalties. Req: { facility?: string, state?: string, naics?: string }

endpoints.name: ai_fact_check
endpoints.description: Grounding oracle — fact-checks a claim against live government/FDA/SEC/Treasury data. Req: { claim: string, domain?: string }

endpoints.name: fda_warning_letters
endpoints.description: FDA warning letters — regulatory enforcement actions for violations of FDA regulations. Req: { company?: string, product?: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: fda_drug_recall_alert
endpoints.description: FDA drug recall enforcement reports via openFDA. Req: { drug?: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: sec_10_q_quarterly_filing
endpoints.description: SEC EDGAR 10-Q quarterly report filing history by ticker. Links to full 10-Q documents on sec.gov. Req: { ticker: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: fred_economic_indicators
endpoints.description: FRED economic indicator series (Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis) — GDP, CPI, UNRATE, FEDFUNDS, and 800k+ others. Req: { series_id: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: sec_13f_institutional_holdings
endpoints.description: SEC EDGAR 13F-HR hedge fund and institutional quarterly position filings. Req: { cik?: string, name?: string }

endpoints.name: sec_13d_13g_activist_filings
endpoints.description: SEC EDGAR 13D and 13G activist investor filings — who holds 5%+ stakes in a company. Req: { ticker: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: osha_inspection_records
endpoints.description: OSHA workplace inspection and violation records (DOL enforcement data). Req: { establishment?: string, naics?: string, state?: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: fda_adverse_events_report
endpoints.description: FDA FAERS adverse events for a drug. Req: { drug: string }

endpoints.name: sec_insider_trade_intel
endpoints.description: SEC Form 4 insider trading activity for any ticker. Req: { ticker: string }

endpoints.name: sec_10_k_annual_filing
endpoints.description: SEC EDGAR 10-K annual report filing history by ticker. Links to full 10-K documents on sec.gov. Req: { ticker: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: congressional_bills_search
endpoints.description: Congress.gov bill search — legislation by keyword, congress number, and status. Req: { query: string, congress?: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: sec_8_k_real_time_filings
endpoints.description: Real-time SEC 8-K material event filings for any ticker. Req: { ticker: string }

endpoints.name: lobbying_disclosures
endpoints.description: Senate LDA lobbying disclosure filings — client, registrant, issue codes, and amounts. Req: { client?: string, registrant?: string, issue?: string, limit?: number }

endpoints.name: perp_funding_aggregator
endpoints.description: Live Hyperliquid funding rates, open interest, mark prices, and volume across 232 perp markets. Sort by OI, filter by symbol. Req: { top_n?: int, symbol?: string }

endpoints.name: market_regime_indicator
endpoints.description: Crypto market regime: Fear & Greed index, global market cap, BTC/ETH dominance, 7-day F&G history, regime classification (EXTREME_FEAR/GREED/NEUTRAL) with trade signal. Req: {}

endpoints.name: defi_yield_rates
endpoints.description: Top DeFi yield pools by risk-adjusted APY across 15000+ pools. Filter by chain, project, min APY, min TVL. Includes IL risk and risk scores. Req: { top_n?: int, min_apy?: float, min_tvl?: float, chain?: string, project?: string }

endpoints.name: crypto_market_overview
endpoints.description: Top crypto coins by market cap with price, volume, 24h/7d change, ATH, circulating supply. Up to 250 coins per page. Req: { per_page?: int, page?: int, order?: string }

endpoints.name: crypto_price_lookup
endpoints.description: Real-time prices for any crypto tokens. Pass comma-separated CoinGecko IDs. Returns price, 24h change, market cap, volume. Req: { tokens: string }

endpoints.name: stablecoin_flow_tracker
endpoints.description: Stablecoin market cap, supply, volume, and DEX flow data for USDT, USDC, DAI, FRAX, TUSD, FDUSD, USDP. Includes stablecoin dominance % and global context. Req: {}

endpoints.name: defi_tvl_ranking
endpoints.description: DeFi protocol TVL rankings with 24h/7d/1m changes. 7800+ protocols. Filter by category and chain. Req: { top_n?: int, category?: string, chain?: string }

endpoints.name: federal_contract_opportunities
endpoints.description: Active federal contract awards from USAspending.gov. Who won what, for how much. Filter by agency, NAICS code, min amount. Req: { top_n?: int, agency?: string, naics?: string, min_amount?: float }

endpoints.name: federal_award_history
endpoints.description: Contract award history by contractor name from USAspending.gov. 5 years of awards. Req: { contractor_name: string, top_n?: int }

endpoints.name: sdvosb_setaside_feed
endpoints.description: SDVOSB/VOSB set-aside contract awards from USAspending.gov. Veteran-owned business opportunities. Your unique federal contracting moat. Req: { top_n?: int, agency?: string }

endpoints.name: sam_entity_verification
endpoints.description: Verify federal contractor entity via USAspending.gov. Returns entity name, UEI, DUNS, recipient level. Req: { entity_name: string }

endpoints.name: federal_spending_by_agency
endpoints.description: Federal spending breakdown by agency from USAspending.gov. Total obligations, outlays, budget authority for 111 agencies. Req: { fiscal_year?: int }

endpoints.name: excluded_parties_check
endpoints.description: Check federal contractor entity for exclusion/debarment indicators. Cross-reference USAspending.gov recipient and award records. Req: { entity_name: string }

endpoints.name: crypto_onchain_analytics
endpoints.description: On-chain token analytics via DexScreener. Price, volume, liquidity, FDV, market cap, txns for any token by contract address. Req: { token_address: string, chain?: string }

endpoints.name: crypto_sentiment_scanner
endpoints.description: Crypto market sentiment: Fear & Greed index, regime classification, 7d history, token-specific volume sentiment. Req: { token_symbol?: string }

endpoints.name: dex_volume_ranking
endpoints.description: DEX trading volume rankings by protocol via DefiLlama. Uniswap, PancakeSwap, etc. with 24h/7d volume. Req: { top_n?: int }

endpoints.name: token_security_audit
endpoints.description: Token contract security audit via GoPlus Labs. Honeypot detection, rugpull risk, buy/sell taxes, ownership analysis, risk score. Req: { chain_id: int, token_address: string }

endpoints.name: whale_wallet_tracker
endpoints.description: Track high-volume trading pairs via DexScreener as whale activity proxy. Volume, liquidity, txns, price changes. Req: { query: string, top_n?: int }

endpoints.name: entity_compliance_check
endpoints.description: SAM.gov registration status + exclusion flag + set-aside types + NAICS codes. Req: { uei: string } or { cage: string }

endpoints.name: druckenmiller_macro_regime_analysis
endpoints.description: Druckenmiller-style macro regime analysis. Classifies RISK-ON/OFF/TRANSITION, 18-month forward liquidity view (Fed, M2, DXY, stablecoin flows), and a concentrated trade thesis with position-sizing (probe/jugular) across 98 Hyperliquid perps (crypto, equities, commodities, FX, indices). Includes funding rates, risk/reward, hedge matrix. Req: { query: string, assets?: string, timeframe?: short|medium|long }

endpoints.name: compliance_anomaly_report
endpoints.description: Submit a bank compliance anomaly to the Leviathan Matrix swarm for scoring. Req: { bank_id: string, agent_id: string, trigger: string, detail: string, severity?: string }

endpoints.name: compliance_bank_audit
endpoints.description: Full Leviathan Matrix compliance audit cycle for a bank. Req: { bank_id: string }

endpoints.name: market_intelligence_feed
endpoints.description: Real-time market intelligence data feed via USAspending.gov. Req: { symbol: string }

endpoints.name: compliance_regulator_query
endpoints.description: Real-time regulator compliance dashboard query for a bank. Req: { bank_id: string }
